task_completion.description: Verifies the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main Rocket.Chat workspace interface (channels, sidebar, etc.), indicating the agent has bypassed the login screen.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent navigated to the 'CI Notification Bot' webhook settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Administration -> Workspace -> Integrations panel in Rocket.Chat, specifically showing the configuration page for the 'CI Notification Bot' incoming webhook.

task_completion.description: Verifies the target channel was updated to #build-alerts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Post to Channel' or equivalent field in the webhook settings containing the exact value '#build-alerts'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the 'Post as' user was updated to build-bot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Post as' field in the webhook settings containing the exact value 'build-bot'.

task_completion.description: Verifies a test JSON payload was sent to the webhook URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window executing a 'curl' command or an API client (like Postman) sending a POST request with a JSON payload to the Rocket.Chat webhook URL.

task_completion.description: Verifies the test message appears in the #build-alerts channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the '#build-alerts' channel open in the Rocket.Chat interface, displaying the test message sent by the 'build-bot' user.

integrity.description: Verifies the webhook configuration was done via the Rocket.Chat web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the web browser running Rocket.Chat for the configuration steps, rather than terminal scripts modifying the database directly.

integrity.description: Verifies the test message was actually sent via the webhook and not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'BOT' badge or app indicator next to the sender's name ('build-bot') in the chat, ensuring the logged-in admin didn't just manually type the message into the channel.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent didn't use browser developer tools to fake the settings or messages.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser's developer tools (Elements/Inspector tab) are not open and being used to alter the text of the channel name or username on the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target channel must be exactly '#build-alerts'. The target username ('Post as' user) must be exactly 'build-bot'. The webhook being edited must be the 'CI Notification Bot'.
